bug_report.summary: Active note/selection changes unexpectedly ("Helpful Links" -> "Split View"), causing word-count indicator to change
steps_to_reproduce: Launch the app and reach the main interface (as in the scenario where the setup wizard is skipped).
Observe the initially selected/active file in the file tree and the word-count indicator in the top-right.
expected_behaviors: The same file should be active/selected as before the change ("Helpful Links" remains selected).
The word-count indicator should correspond to the same active document as before (e.g., remains at 61 words for the previously active note).
actual_behaviors: After the change, the selection/active file appears to switch to "Split View" (highlight moves).
The word-count indicator changes accordingly (e.g., from 61 words to 150 words), indicating an unintended active-document switch.

bug_report.summary: Clicking File menu unexpectedly changes active editor/document (word count switches from 61 to 150)
steps_to_reproduce: Open the main app window with multiple editor panes/tabs visible (e.g., ‘Split View’ and ‘Helpful Links’).
Click the top menubar ‘File’ to open the File dropdown.
expected_behaviors: Opening the File menu should not change the active editor/document selection.
The top-right word-count indicator should remain consistent with the previously active document.
actual_behaviors: After the change, opening the File menu results in the top-right word-count indicator changing from ‘61 words’ to ‘150 words’, indicating the active editor/document focus switched unexpectedly.

bug_report.summary: Opening a workspace causes unexpected active-file selection change and word-count indicator mismatch (61 -> 150)
steps_to_reproduce: Open the app with multiple notes/panes available.
Use File → Open workspace… and open a workspace (e.g., newly created “refs-nocite-03”).
Observe which file is selected in the file tree and the word-count indicator in the top-right after the workspace loads.
expected_behaviors: After opening the workspace, the previously active/expected file should remain selected (or the app should deterministically select the same default file as before the change).
The top-right word-count indicator should reflect the actual active document and remain consistent with the selected file.
actual_behaviors: After the change, the selected/active file switches unexpectedly (e.g., from “Helpful Links” to “Split View”).
The top-right word-count indicator changes accordingly (e.g., from “61 words” to “150 words”), suggesting unintended focus/active-document switching on workspace open.

bug_report.summary: Right-clicking workspace folder changes active document/focus (word count changes 61 → 150 and selection highlight shifts)
steps_to_reproduce: Open a workspace with multiple notes open/visible.
Right-click the workspace folder in the left file tree to open the context menu.
expected_behaviors: Opening the workspace-folder context menu should not change the active document or selection in the file tree.
The top-right word-count indicator should remain associated with the previously active document.
actual_behaviors: After the change, right-clicking the workspace folder results in the active document/selection changing (highlight shifts).
The top-right word-count indicator switches from “61 words” to “150 words”, indicating an unintended focus/active-document change.
